raw_text:
Unofficial Translation by Insurance Regulator of Cambodia (IRC)

**Section 3**
**Other Expenses**

**Article 26 ..**

The insurance company shall pay a monthly contribution of 0.5 (zero-five) percent of gross premium into the **IRC’s** account prior to the 15th day of the next month, to support the operation of the **IRC**.

**Chapter 5**
**Penalties**

**Article 27 ..**

Insurance company and local insurance company branch that do not comply with the provisions of this Prakas shall be subject to administrative measures from the **IRC** as following:
- Warning
- Guidance
- Restrictions on License/ Certificate/ Principle Approval
- Withdrawal of License/ Certificate/ Principle Approval
- Restrictions on the insurance business activities.

**Article 28 ..**

General insurance companies or life insurance companies that do not request for license renewal before 30 (thirty) of business days of the expiration date of the license as stipulated in article 8 of this Prakas shall be subject to the administrative measures as stipulated in article 27 of this Prakas and/or are fined from 10 000 000 (ten million) riels to 50 000 000 (fifty million) riels by the **IRC**.

**Article 29 ..**

General insurance companies or life insurance companies that do not request for renewing certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch before 30 (thirty) of business days of the expiration date of the certificate as stipulated in article 13 of this Prakas shall be subject to the administrative measures as stipulated in article 27 of this Prakas and/or are fined from 5 000 000 (five million) riels to 25 000 000 (twenty-five million) riels by the **IRC**.
In the case of continued committing violations, the companies shall be fined in the twice amount of the previous fine and/or to be subject to the disciplinary sanctions as stated in insurance law.

**Article 30 ..**

General insurance companies or life insurance companies that do not apply for renewing the license and/or certificate of local general insurance company branch or local life insurance company branch after the expiration date of the license and/or certificate as stipulated in article 9 and article 14 of this Prakas shall be punished according to the insurance law and shall urgently apply for renewing the license and/or certificate in 30 (thirty) days after the expiration date of the license and/or certificate.
